prompt: The provided image shows a young woman standing full-length in a studio. She wears a vivid SCARLET RED cotton midi dress with a fine tonal pinstripe, thin shoulder straps, an elasticated shirred bodice and a full flowing skirt, plus flat strappy sandals. Keep HER 100% identical and untouched - her exact face, hair, skin tone, body, pose, arms, hands, and especially the scarlet red pinstripe dress and its precise colour. Do NOT alter, repaint, recolour, restyle, resize, sharpen, or move any part of her or her dress. Treat her as a locked, fixed foreground layer. Replace ONLY the plain studio backdrop behind and beneath her with a new photographic scene, compositing her in completely unchanged and standing naturally grounded on the surface at her feet. New background scene: a Lisbon street wall of blue-and-white glazed azulejo tiles beside pale stucco, traditional black-and-white calcada stone pavement underfoot, soft bright morning light and cool calm tones that make the scarlet dress stand out. No florals. Integration requirements: match soft, even, slightly warm late-morning daylight from the same frontal-left direction as the original so the light across her body stays consistent; add a soft realistic contact shadow beneath her sandals so she is grounded, not floating; render the background with a gentle shallow depth of field so she stays crisp in front of it; warm the white balance subtly so the scene matches her skin tone; keep her full-length with visible ground at her feet. Native 2:3 vertical portrait, photoreal editorial fashion photography, seamless realistic compositing, no text, no extra people, no florals near the dress.
